title: BLOCK 2 FINAL: Punctuation mastery
description: Closing test for Block 2 — all punctuation marks at 30 WPM
text: she wrote: "the path was long, but worth it; we learned much, and grew strong." he replied: "that's the key — patience pays off!" they shook hands; the year ended well.
tips: 180 chars with every punctuation mark you've learned
Pass at 30 WPM with under 14 errors = Block 2 complete
Block 3: numbers and symbols open after this

character_tips.anna: 🎓 BLOCK 2 FINAL! Punctuation mastered. Numbers and symbols next.
character_tips.maxim: Punctuation — done. Block 3 (numbers) brings new keys to the table.
character_tips.knopych: BLOCK 2 BOSS DEFEATED! 🐉 Numbers world unlocks! 🔢
